overall.description: A nighttime first-person walk through a neon-lit amusement park pier in GTA V (Del Perro Pier). The camera moves smoothly past various attractions including a ferris wheel, roller coaster, and gift shops, with wet wooden boardwalks reflecting colorful lights. The scene transitions from covered shop areas to open pier with ocean views.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pier walkway with gift shops and arcade

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered pier area past gift shops and arcade machines

entered.detail: octagonal wooden kiosk with 'GIFTS AT THE PIER' illuminated signage
shop front with blue and white striped canvas awning
large illuminated ferris wheel with colorful neon lights
shop front with bright interior lighting and merchandise displays

segments.scene_description: Walking through the covered section of the pier on wet wooden boardwalks. A central gift kiosk and shops with blue striped awnings line the path, while the illuminated ferris wheel is visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: ferris wheel and roller coaster base area

events.description: moves from covered shop area into the open plaza beneath the ferris wheel
passes under the roller coaster track structure

agents.ego_description: walking under the roller coaster tracks and around the ferris wheel base, passing metal support structures

entered.detail: elevated steel roller coaster track with green and yellow neon lighting
large steel support columns for the amusement rides
building facade painted purple with decorative cactus mural

segments.scene_description: Moving into the main attraction area beneath the towering ferris wheel and roller coaster tracks. The metal support beams frame the view as the camera passes colorful building facades and ride infrastructure.

events.description: enters the area with decorated trees and the Vanilla Unicorn sign

agents.ego_description: walking past decorated trees wrapped in colorful lights toward the ticket booth area

entered.detail: large illuminated sign with 'VANILLA UNICORN' text and unicorn logo
trees wrapped in dense multicolored string lights in wooden planters
small octagonal wooden kiosk with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Walking through a decorated section of the pier featuring trees wrapped in colorful lights and a prominent Vanilla Unicorn sign. The area includes a small wooden ticket booth and planters with illuminated topiary.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pier end with food carts and ocean view

events.description: exits the built-up amusement area into the open pier end with ocean views
first clear view of the ocean and distant city lights across the water

agents.ego_description: walking past food carts toward the end of the pier with the ocean coming into view

entered.detail: food vendor cart with red and yellow striped umbrella
dark ocean water extending to the horizon
distant city skyline lights across the water
illuminated white building at the far end of the pier structure

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the built-up amusement area onto the open pier end. Food carts with colorful umbrellas line the path as the ocean and distant city lights become visible across the dark water, with the pier end building illuminated in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: pier edge walkway with ocean views

events.description: a pedestrian appears walking in the opposite direction
approaching the illuminated pier end building

agents.ego_description: walking along the pier edge railing, observing the ocean and city lights, then approaching the end building

notable_agents.action: woman in light-colored clothing walking in the opposite direction along the pier

entered.detail: tall street lamps with warm yellow lighting along the pier edge

segments.scene_description: Walking along the outer edge of the pier with expansive views of the ocean and distant city lights. A pedestrian passes by in the opposite direction as the camera approaches the illuminated end building of the pier, with street lamps lining the walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit amusement pier that transitions from a sheltered shopping corridor to an expansive open waterfront. It begins on wet wooden boardwalks beneath blue striped awnings and gift kiosks, moving forward as the illuminated ferris wheel grows larger in the distance. As the camera passes beneath the towering metal beams of the ferris wheel and roller coaster tracks, the scene shifts into a decorated promenade featuring light-wrapped trees, a small ticket booth, and a prominent Vanilla Unicorn sign. The path then opens up past colorful food cart umbrellas, allowing the dark ocean and distant city lights to emerge from behind the ride infrastructure. Finally, the camera glides along the outer edge of the pier past a lone pedestrian, moving toward the illuminated end building under the glow of steady street lamps.
